titleStmt.title: SII 33.76: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 76. (A.R. No. 80 of 1947.) Tirukkaṇnamaṅgai, Mannargudi Taluk, Tanjore District, Tamil Nadu.

summary.p: West and south Paṭṭi of the Bhaktavatsalaperumāḷ temple.
This is dated Subhānu, Chaitra śu. 15.

Records the gift of 15 1/2 vēlis of land to Lakshmaṇa-munulu for the expenses of running a feeding in house Rāmānujakūṭam, for conducting worship and offerings and for repairs to the temple of the god Bhaktavatsalaperumaḷ at Tirukaṇṇamaṅgai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: śubhamastu . subhānu saṁvatsara caitra śuddha 15 lu śrīmadaccuta vijayarāghava nāyani vāru tirukaṇṇa maṁgga dharmmakaṭṭaḍa lakṣmaṇamunulaku Iccina dharmmaśāsanaṁ tama dharmmakaṭṭaḍaku vaḍakhaṁḍamulōnu panneṁḍu vēlinyālānu tōṁṭalu mūṭiki reṁḍu vēlinyālānu kottaguḍilonu Okaṭinnaranyālānu Aṁdu padihēnuvēlinnara nyālaṁpūrvamu tamaku yiruvai Eṁḍlanuṁḍi naḍacinadi mēmippuḍu nagarikaḍitamaṁduvrāyiṁci mākaṭṭaḍagānu nitya rāmānuja kūṭamunnu tirupaṇinni tōṁṭalunnu maṁṭapālunnu naḍapiṁcukarammani kaṭṭaḍacēstimi ganaka Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyigānu śiṣyapāraṁparyaṁgānu dharmmaparipālanaṁśēsukoni sukhānanuṁḍēdi .
Digital edition of SII 33.76 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
